feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Migrate Your Data - Which Migration Object to use for mass creation of Articles
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

Can you please advise, which Migration Object to use for mass creation of Articles.

While using migration object 'Product' which creates the Materials and those are available in MM03. However when trying to check the same in MM43, getting error message as "You cannot use the material for retail (MAW1 missing)". 

Table MAW1 (Material Master: Default Fields and Special Retail Fields) has no entries.

Please advise.

Regards,

SureshRT

entry.title: Regarding the transfer acquisition method in LTMOM
entry.content:
We are currently considering data migration using LTMC.
Please provide guidance on the following two points.

1. Is it possible to create a project using LTMC in the development system and then transfer and import it to the validation system? 
If transfer is possible, please provide the transfer creation method. 

2. Is it possible to add items using LTMOM in the development system and then transfer and import them to the validation system? 
If transfer is possible, please provide the transfer creation method. 

Thank you & Regards,
Tsubasa 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Migration of Legacy Data to SAP Public Cloud: An Overview and Key Questions
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

We are currently facing the challenge of migrating legacy data to the SAP Cloud, Public Edition. We know and also recommend to our client to not migrate legacy data in SAP Public Cloud for Controlling purposes. Our goal is to migrate values up to the end of the fiscal year 2023 and subsequently capture monthly P&L values for controlling purposes. In this context, we have several specific questions regarding the migration process that we would like to share and discuss with you:

Question 1: Is it possible to migrate monthly values in SAP Public Cloud?

We want to ensure that our monthly values can be migrated correctly and completely to the SAP Public Cloud. Are there any best practices or specific tools that can assist us in this process?

Question 2: General and subsidiary ledgers in SAP must always be reconciled - does this mean that all objects need to be migrated monthly?

An important question for us is whether it is necessary to migrate all objects monthly to ensure that the general and subsidiary ledgers are always reconciled. Are there specific requirements or best practices we should follow in this regard?

Question 3: Migration of the asset subledger: Should this be migrated as of 31.12.23, and then all asset movements for 2024 be booked in SAP?

Our consideration is to migrate the asset subledger as of December 31, 2023, and subsequently book all asset movements for the year 2024 in SAP. Is this approach sensible, and are there any specific challenges we should be aware of?

Question 4: Can theoretically only P&L values be migrated monthly on their own?

Another point we would like to discuss is the possibility of migrating only the P&L values monthly, without considering other data. Is this feasible and advisable in the SAP Public Cloud?

Question 5: What options are available in SAP Public Cloud Controlling Apps or functionalities to migrate or upload these legacy data for CO comparisons with the previous year?

We are looking for effective solutions to migrate or upload our legacy data for CO comparisons with the previous year. What Controlling Apps or functionalities does the SAP Public Cloud offer to achieve this?

Question 6: What options does the customer have in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) to analyze their legacy data on a monthly basis for CO purposes?

Lastly, we are interested in understanding the options available in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) to analyze legacy data on a monthly basis for CO purposes. What tools or functionalities can be utilized to create detailed analyses and reports?

We look forward to your experiences, tips, and best practices on these topics and are eager for a constructive discussion!

Best regards,

Mara

entry.title: AR - Open Items Migration in SAP Public Cloud: Interface Integration vs. Upload Template
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

As we continue to navigate the complexities of migrating our legacy data to the SAP Public Cloud, we have encountered a specific question regarding the migration of open items in the subledger. We are exploring whether it is possible to import open items using an interface instead of the standard upload template. Here are the key points we would like to discuss:

Is it possible to import subledger open items using an interface instead of the upload template?

We are considering the feasibility of using an interface to import subledger open items. Has anyone in the community successfully utilized an interface for this purpose, and if so, what were the benefits and challenges encountered?

Does the SAP Migration Cockpit accept interfaces for open items migration, or must the general and subledger always match using the migration templates?

We are also interested in understanding whether the SAP Migration Cockpit supports the use of interfaces for migrating open items. Is it mandatory for general and subledger data to always match using the predefined migration templates, or is there flexibility in the method of data import?

Understanding the best approach for migrating open items is crucial for the accuracy and integrity of our financial data. We appreciate any insights, experiences, or best practices you can share regarding the use of interfaces versus upload templates for this aspect of the migration process.

Thank you for your support and contributions to this discussion!

Best regards,

Mara

entry.title: How to improve the performance of the Migration Cockpit?
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

We're using the Migration Cockpit's Direct Transfer approach in one of our Migration Projects, and in it we've noticed some long runtimes, depending on the circumstances. Sometimes, even the cancellation of a long running activity takes a little too long to finish. Since we're facing this, we'd like to ask:

  • Is there a way to improve the performance of the Migration Cockpit app?

Best regards,
Data Migration team


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Migration Cockpit: missing Migration Objects Business partner, Letter of credit and Bank guarantee
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

We wanted to test the following Migration Objects in one of our systems, using the Staging Tables migration method:

  • Business partner
  • Letter of credit
  • Bank guarantee

But we can't find them in the Migration Project creation screen!

Is there anything else we need to do or know to use these Migration Objects? We're using an SAP S/4HANA 2021.

Best regards,
Data Migration team


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: R11 401 Enter value for field
entry.content:
Hey!

I have a problem migrating BP-test data for customer and vendor. I use the migration cockpit and XML-datasheets.

I get the Error R11 401 Enter value for search field for the BP while trying to simulate them.

The problem is that in my data it is filled in and also in the instance itself it is shown as being filled in. 

The conditions of the field are a max length of 20. 

The value I choose is : 'Test_search_0001'

I couldn't find anything wrong with the mapping either, but I am not to familiar. 

If you have any ideas on how to fix it I would be very thankfull if you would share them!

 

Much thanks and have a nice day

Liz

entry.title: Incorrectly Set Keys and mandatory fields in Migration Objects "Customer" and "Supplier"
entry.content:
The migration objects "Customer" and "Supplier" have incorrectly set keys.

  1. "Language" on sheet "General Data" is not set as mandatory.
  2. "Bank Data"/"Bank Details" on sheet "Field List" of objects "Customer" and "Supplier": field "IBAN" is incorrectly marked as a key field

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Migration Cockpit - Direct Transfer - BOMs with History with effectivity parameter
entry.content:
Dear community,

We're currently migration BOMs from ECC to S/4 HANA and we're facing the following challenge for lots of BOMs. The method CNV_PE_S4_PP_MATERIAL_BOM_ECN doesn't consider changes in positions with ECN numbers with effectivity parameters. These positions are migrated but as new positions instead of as modifications of the same position.

In the source system

In the target system.

entry.title: How to migrate G/L accounts to SAP S/4HANA in a greenfield implementation?
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

My team is working on a greenfield S/4HANA implementation, since we're migrating from an SAP ECC to an SAP S/4HANA 2023 Cloud Private Edition. With this in mind, we'd like to know if:

  • Are there any tools or applications we could use to migrate our current G/L accounts to the new SAP S/4HANA system?

Thanks for your support!

Best regards,
Implementation team


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to add extra fields, such as "Condition types" to object "MM - Purchase order (only open PO)"?
entry.content:
Within SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud environment, what are the options when it comes to adding additional fields to migration objects, such as "MM - Purchase order (only open PO)"?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Problem in migration cockpit
entry.content:
We have a problem with the cockpit migration, we cannot transfer the data from client 100 to client 110, the problem is detailed in the attached documentation

entry.title: Convert customer with different partner roles into one business partner
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I have a problem. Currently, I'm working on a customer-vendor integration to convert customers and vendors into business partners in order to prepare our SAP system for the S/4HANA transformation.

We are currently using SAP Version ERP 6.0 Ehp 8.

For some customers, we have different delivery addresses, so we created a partner role for these customers with a different number range.

My question is: can I convert a customer and all its partner roles into one business partner, if yes how, or do I need to convert each customer and its partner roles into separate business partners?

I hope you can help me.

entry.title: Migration of significantly high volumes
entry.content:
What are the relevant considerations when it comes to the migration of high volumes of data, for example, a project and/or migration objects with millions of instances?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP ECC vs SAP S/4 HANA Table
entry.content:
Dear Friends,

We are planning to migrate from SAP ECC vs SAP S/4 HANA. Can anyone please provide what are the SAP tables will be impacted, what are impacted fields in each tables.

Any help please. 

Thanks

Guru

entry.title: Unable to Delete "Migrate Your Data" (Migration Cockpit) App Instances In Production System
entry.content:
Why it is not possible to delete migration object instances from a prod system? Sometimes also from a quality system?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Step M20 in Finance conversion to S4Hana
entry.content:
Dears,  I am working in a Finance conversion to S4Hana project. There is an error in step M20 in transaction fins_mig_status: Message no. FINS_ML_MIG013 "Original MBEW and it's CDS-redirect-view differs for following entries" the problem is for as many as error lines , the total value is 0 in MBEW table after accepting the error . Our Software Component is S4Core 107. Support Package SAPK-10702INS4Core. I checked the SAP Note 3191968 but it didn't help. Please help.

 

Thank you so much for your help in advance.

entry.title: mass add BP role in existing BP
entry.content:
Dear Experts

Good day.

I upload customer data by migration projects successfully.

How can I add vender role in existing BP number ? 

thanks~

entry.title: Fiori Migration Cockpit Error "Another activity is in process for this project. Try again later."
entry.content:
Our team has just moved from LTMC to the Fiori launchpad migration cockpit for data uploading. I have created a Migration project with three objects:

1) Object Classification - Material (MARA)

2) Product

3) Product - extend existing records by new org levels.

The issue we are facing is some unexplained error that occurs randomly at any stage for any object either when we click the Prepare or Simulate button it gives us the error "Another activity is in process for this project. Try again later." (Picture attached) and below that error, it gives a warning popup "Migration cockpit The preparation step has failed for one or more migration objects. Navigate to the "Monitoring" screen for details.".

But when we see in the Running activities or Monitoring tab nothing is running and it shows '0' in running activities. Sometimes no such error occurs and it let us upload the template smoothly with all steps but sometimes this error occurs randomly so we have to upload templates again and do turnarounds in order to load it.

All the pictures are attached for your reference please let me know how to resolve this issue so that we can upload all the templates smoothly without such errors.

Thanks

entry.title: Some questions about S4Core 108
entry.content:
While operating in S4Core 108, I have met some questions.
 
1.I want to transport migration project from DEV 100 to DEV 110(different clients in one system). I tried two methods but both failed.
 
   1.1 I use the method "goto - use project in different client" in LTMOM,but failed.error message is  "Project is already assigned to the current client".(already choose the development package newly created instead of $TMP)
 
   1.2 I use LTMOM to add the migration project to the TR in DEV 100,but when l try to use SCC1N to transport it to DEV110, failed. the message said "Before Export Phase Failed. Please check Log for Details"(I am sure that the migration project is fully included in the TR, and the TR is newly created and don't include other conception. Already use SM12 to check and found no table locked in username.Already use SU53 to check and found no authorization lack.)
 
 
2.Another question is about "import financial plan data". I use it to upload project cost plan instead of CJ40. but fiscal year is mandatory,then how can i upload the overall cost of project?
 
3.And i found that the fiscal year data needs to be maintained in OKEQ CO version 0,but my upload data's plan version is P01. So why is the fiscal year data controlled by version 0's configuration instead of version P01's configuration?
 
4.What' more, I also found that WBS must be marked as Statistical, then the fiacal year can be controlled by config OKEQ. If WBS not be marked as Statistical, the fiacal year can be any year and out of control.  Why does this need to be associated with WBS attributes "Statistical"?
